candidates.title: Use pnpm in this repo

occurrence.notes: CI failed due to 'npm install' on a pnpm workspace.

candidates.suggested_rule: Package manager: pnpm — use 'pnpm install' and 'pnpm run ...'; never use 'npm install' in this repo.

candidates.title: Use pnpm in this repo

occurrence.notes: New contributor used npm; lockfile mismatch occurred.

candidates.suggested_rule: Package manager: pnpm — use 'pnpm install' and 'pnpm run ...'; never use 'npm install' in this repo.

candidates.title: Use pnpm in this repo

occurrence.notes: package-lock.json added accidentally; pnpm-lock.yaml is authoritative.

candidates.suggested_rule: Package manager: pnpm — use 'pnpm install' and 'pnpm run ...'; never use 'npm install' in this repo.

candidates.title: Set timeouts and retries on external HTTP calls

occurrence.notes: Intermittent API stalls without client timeouts.

candidates.suggested_rule: Default HTTP client timeout to 5–10s and exponential backoff retries (x3) for idempotent operations.

candidates.title: Set timeouts and retries on external HTTP calls

occurrence.notes: Webhook worker hung due to no read timeout.

candidates.suggested_rule: Default HTTP client timeout to 5–10s and exponential backoff retries (x3) for idempotent operations.

candidates.title: Use Poetry for Python services with Python 3.11

occurrence.notes: Engineer attempted pip; project is standardized on Poetry and Python 3.11.

candidates.suggested_rule: For Python services run 'poetry install' and use the local .venv; Python 3.11 is required.
